name: Firsto
description: Product Hunt-style launch platform built to give every maker visibility rather than only the top-voted few; audience is indie makers and founders who want a fair shot at exposure.

auth.notes: Free email/password account to submit and manage products. Every listing gets visibility regardless of vote count; paid options may add featured placement.

best_practices: Firsto promises visibility to every maker, so focus on a complete, polished listing rather than only chasing votes.
Lead with a clear tagline that states the core benefit; it is what readers see in the feed and on shared cards.
Fill in every field and add rich media, since well-rounded profiles get surfaced longer on a fair-exposure platform.
Choose precise topics/tags so your product lands in the niches where it actually competes.
Upload a clean square logo and 2-3 screenshots that show the product, not just a landing page.
Write an authentic maker first comment explaining the problem you solve and what feedback helps you most.
Add your maker name and Twitter/X so the community can follow you across launches.

questions.label: Tagline
questions.help: One punchy line stating the core benefit.

questions.label: Description
questions.help: Short summary of what it does and who it helps.

questions.label: Topics / tags
questions.help: Pick the niches your product belongs to.

questions.label: Gallery images
questions.help: Screenshots or a GIF showing the product.

questions.label: First comment (maker note)
questions.help: Explain why you built it and the feedback you want.
